features: INSTANT RELIEF: NIVEA Post Shave Balm instantly soothes sensitive skin from irritation, redness, and razor burn to prevent post-shave dryness and tightness
INTENSE 24H HYDRATION: The NIVEA MEN Sensitive Post Shave Balm not only comforts the skin after shaving but instantly soothes to deliver intense, long-lasting hydration with its nourishing formula
LESS SENSITIVE SKIN: The nourishing formula of the NIVEA post shave balm for men cares for skin post-shave, ensuring less sensitive skin with regular use. Apply liberally on face after shaving skin
SMOOTH AND CARED FOR SKIN: The sensitive shave balm is lightweight and non-greasy, absorbing quickly to soothe skin, replenish moisture, and prevent post-shave tightness
SHAVING ESSENTIALS: NIVEA MEN Sensitive Post Shave Balm provides a comprehensive post-shave regimen for men with sensitive skin
description: Product Description NIVEA MEN Sensitive Post Shave Balm - Instantly relieves skin from 5 signs of irritation NIVEA MEN Sensitive Post Shave Balm is here to relieve your freshly shaved skin from irritations. Crafted with precision, this balm alleviates irritation and redness as well as offering immediate razor burn relief. The balm provides your skin with an intense, long-lasting hydration for ultimate skin comfort. Enriched with soothing agents, it is fast-absorbing, non-greasy and non-sticky, making it a perfect addition your sensitive skin care routine. Dermatologically tested, it is approved for men with sensitive skin. Application information: Apply liberally on the face after shaving skin. Product Benefits: Instant relief from irritation 24h hydration Smooth and cared for skin Less sensitive skin with regular usage Daily skin comfort Ingredients Aqua (Water) Glycerin Dicaprylyl Carbonate Panthenol Isopropyl Palmitate Tocopheryl Acetate Bisabolol Chamomilla Recutita Glycine Soja Tapioca Starch Triceteareth-4 Phosphate Sodium Carbomer Citric Acid Phenoxyethanol Methylparaben Parfum (Fragrance) Directions Use. Apply liberally on shaved skin. For best results shave with NIVEA FOR MEN Soothing Shave Gel or Foam. Safety Warning keep away from kids Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd. Trinity Central Trinity Park Bickenhill Lane Birmingham B37 7ES See more
